properties.name: manage_plan
properties.description: Allows you set up, track and update your current set of tasks. Use this to setup general plans or plans for creating multiple beats of content over a specific number of beats / turns.
properties.instructions:
Manage your task plans. Pass plain text instructions describing what you want to do.

To create a scene outline: describe the scene and specify the beat count.
To create a general plan: describe the goal and list the tasks.
To complete a task: reference the task ID.
To edit a task: reference the task ID and describe changes.
To insert a task: describe the new task and where to place it.
To remove a task: reference the task ID to remove.
To delete the plan: state you want to delete/remove the plan.
properties.example_json: [{"instructions": "Create a 6-beat scene outline: A tense encounter in the library where two strangers discover they're searching for the same book."}, {"instructions": "Mark task a1b2c3d4 as completed"}, {"instructions": "Create a plan to investigate the strange signals: 1) Check the antenna array 2) Review the signal logs 3) Report findings to command"}, {"instructions": "Change task e7f3877a description to: Establish the new character's motivation"}, {"instructions": "Add a new task after e7f3877a: Have the party discuss their next move"}, {"instructions": "Remove task a1b2c3d4 from the plan"}, {"instructions": "Delete the current plan"}]

properties.name: instructions
properties.instructions: What the plan should accomplish. For scene outlines: describe the setting, characters involved, tone, themes, and any specific events or arcs. For general plans: describe the goal and scope.

properties.name: beat_count
properties.instructions: The exact number of beats to generate. Each beat represents one narrator or conversation generation turn.

properties.name: instructions
properties.instructions: What the scene outline should cover. Include the setting, characters involved, tone, themes, and any specific events or arcs.

ONLY for creating beat-by-beat scene outlines. Use when the instruction mentions beats, outlines, or a specific beat count. Extract the beat count as an integer and pass the scene description as instructions.

examples.instructions: A tense confrontation in the captain's quarters
Elmer and Kaira encounter spatial distortions on the ship, building from eerie calm to cosmic horror

properties.description_chat: Create a beat-by-beat scene outline with perspective and pacing.
instruction_examples: Create an 8-beat scene outline for a tense confrontation
Create a 12-beat outline in third person limited, past tense, from the protagonist's perspective

properties.description_chat: Create a general purpose plan for you track things you need to do.

properties.name: instructions
properties.instructions: A description of what this plan is for. This will be shown in the plan status.

properties.name: tasks
properties.instructions: A list of task objects. Each task should have a 'description' field. For beat tasks, also include 'type', 'characters', 'pacing', and 'tension'.

properties.name: meta
properties.instructions: Optional metadata for the plan as a dictionary. For example: {"perspective": "third person limited", "estimated_words": 2000}.
ONLY for generic task lists (NOT scene outlines, NOT completing tasks). Use when the instruction describes a set of tasks or goals without mentioning beats or outlines.
ONLY for marking tasks as done. Use when the instruction mentions 'mark', 'complete', 'done', or contains a plan ID and task ID. Extract the plan_id and task_id from the instruction text.

properties.name: task_id
properties.instructions: The ID of the task/beat to mark as completed. Use the task ID from the plan.

properties.name: task
properties.instructions: The task to insert as a dictionary. For generic tasks: {'description': '...'}. For beats: include 'type' (narration/dialogue/action/transition/reveal), 'characters' (list), 'pacing' (slow/moderate/fast), and 'tension' (0.0-1.0).

properties.description_chat: Mark a task / beat as completed in the active plan.
properties.description_scene_direction: Mark a task / beat as completed in the active plan.
instruction_examples: Mark beat e7f3877a as completed in plan abc123

properties.name: task_id
properties.instructions: The ID of the task/beat to edit. Use the task ID from the plan.

properties.name: updates
properties.instructions: A dictionary of fields to update on the task. Only include fields you want to change. For generic tasks: 'description', 'status'. For beats: 'description', 'type' (narration/dialogue/action/transition/reveal), 'characters' (list of character names), 'pacing' (slow/moderate/fast), 'tension' (0.0-1.0), 'status'.

For editing an existing task or beat in the active plan. Use when the instruction mentions changing, updating, or modifying a specific task/beat. Extract the task_id and only the fields being changed as updates.

updates.description: Establish the new character's backstory and motivation

properties.name: position
properties.instructions: Where to insert the task. Use 'start' to insert at the beginning, 'end' to append at the end, or a task ID to insert after that specific task.
For removing a task or beat from the active plan. Use when the instruction mentions removing, deleting, or dropping a specific task/beat by ID.

For inserting a new task or beat into the active plan. Use when the instruction mentions adding, inserting, or appending a task/beat. Extract the task definition and position. Position is 'start', 'end', or an existing task ID to insert after.

task.description: Have the party discuss their next move
Introduce the consequences of the earlier decision
A flash of light illuminates the bridge
Check the engine room for damage

properties.name: task_id
properties.instructions: The ID of the task/beat to remove from the plan.
For deleting the entire active plan. Use when the instruction mentions deleting, removing, or discarding the whole plan (not a specific task).

properties.description_chat: Insert a new task in the active plan.
properties.description_scene_direction: Insert a new task in the active plan.
instruction_examples: Add a new task after e7f3877a: Have the party discuss their next move
Insert a narration beat at the start: The station looms ahead, silent and dark
Append a new task: Introduce the consequences of the earlier decision
Add a dialogue beat after b19c2b5e between Elena and Marcus about the plan

properties.description_chat: Edit an existing task in the active plan.
properties.description_scene_direction: Edit an existing task in the active plan.
instruction_examples: Change task e7f3877a description to: Establish the new character's motivation
Update beat b19c2b5e to a dialogue beat between Elena and Marcus
Set the tension of beat a1b2c3d4 to 0.9 and pacing to fast
Mark task c3d4e5f6 as pending again

properties.description_chat: Remove a task from the active plan.
properties.description_scene_direction: Remove a task from the active plan.
instruction_examples: Remove task e7f3877a from the plan
Drop the task about investigating the signals

properties.description_chat: Remove the currently active plan entirely.
properties.description_scene_direction: Remove the currently active plan entirely.
instruction_examples: Remove this plan, I want to start over
Discard the plan and start fresh

example_json.name: example_json
example_json.description: An example JSON payload for the action

allow_concurrent.name: allow_concurrent
allow_concurrent.description: Whether the action can be called concurrently
